subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Jenáb-i-Amín hath, in his letters, offered the highest praise of thy steadfastness, constancy and zeal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی المیثاق جناب امین در محررات نهایت ستایش از استقامت و ثبات و همت
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
